briefs.title: ICBC Rate Review Deadline Extended to 2027, December 2025 Filing Exempted
briefs.summary: BC extended ICBC's policy year deadline from March 31, 2026 to March 31, 2027, and exempted ICBC from filing a general rate change application (a formal request to adjust insurance premiums) by December 15, 2025.

key_dates.label: ICBC general rate change application exemption deadline — BC Utilities Commission
